nodes.label: Cardinal Rule: Deterministic Numbers Only
nodes.rationale: Decision-bearing numbers must come only from tested pure Python to ensure backtestability and trustworthiness. LLM writes thesis prose only, never a number.

nodes.label: Research-Only Disclaimer
nodes.rationale: Keeps the project out of SEBI Research Analyst registration territory. Signals are directional research views, not buy/sell recommendations.

nodes.label: Scaffold Heuristics
nodes.rationale: Current analyzers are transparent scaffolds (~50% hit rate). The validation layer decides what has edge, not the docs.

nodes.label: Keyless Default Path
nodes.rationale: Zero-setup property: anyone can clone and run with no API keys. Keys only unlock extras.
